name: Jeff Struecker
title: Former Army Ranger & Pastor
bio: American former Army Ranger who served in the Battle of Mogadishu (depicted in 'Black Hawk Down'). Retired as a Chaplain (Major). Now serves as a pastor and seminary professor.
faith: Struecker's faith was tested in combat during the Battle of Mogadishu, where he led convoys through enemy fire. He became an Army chaplain and now pastors a church in Georgia. He has spoken extensively about how faith sustained him in combat.

videos.title: Jeff Struecker - Black Hawk Down Faith Story
videos.note: Struecker has shared his combat faith testimony widely

sources.title: Jeff Struecker — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography of the Black Hawk Down veteran turned pastor

sources.title: The Road to Unafraid
sources.note: By Jeff Struecker. His account of faith under fire in Mogadishu

tagline: Black Hawk Down hero who traded combat for the pulpit
